, Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor Direct Known Subclasses: CommandListener , LevelListener , Listener public class Receiver extends X10Interface Listen for X10 commands propagating thro

Interface Listen for X10 commands propagating through an X10 network. When a command is detected, this actor requests a firing by calling fireAtCurrentTime() on its director. Alternatively, it can be triggered via the trigger port, or fired by the

e triggered via the trigger port, or fired by the scheduler when it chooses. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: Receiver.java,v 1.16 2004/04/13 03:10:35 cxh Exp $ Author: Colin Cochran and Edward A. Lee See Also: Serialized Form Accepted Rating: Y

s have arrived. The type is boolean with default false. discardOldData public Parameter discardOldData Indicator of whether to discard old data. If this is true, then the fire() method will read all available data, but use only the most recent

ll available data, but use only the most recent X10 command, discarding the rest. This is a boolean that defaults to false. trigger public TypedIOPort trigger The trigger port. The type of this port is undeclared, meaning that it will resolve

ort is undeclared, meaning that it will resolve to any data type. Constructor Detail Receiver public Receiver ( CompositeEntity container, java.lang.String name) throws NameDuplicationException , IllegalActionException Cons
